sourceSummary.oneLine: Firmware release history listing versions firm_1.1.1 through firm_1.2.1 with dates and change contents.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports traceability of MCU firmware changes, including FPGA register changes, logging, auto-trigger behavior, image acquisition, Ethernet throughput, packet structures, and kernel configuration updates.
keyPoints: firm_1.1.1 includes changes to console register address output, FPGA register names and addresses for auto-trigger, logging implementation, timeout changes, and kernel boot stability changes.
firm_1.1.4 changes image buffer size for improved Gigabit Ethernet throughput and adds Atheros 1000MB PHY kernel configuration.
firm_1.2.0 adds and removes FPGA parameters including NEGA_AED_TH, POSI_AED_TH, and AED_DARK_DELAY.
firm_1.2.1 changes Auto-Trigger Mode status message delay time from 1 second to 0.5 seconds.

entities.name: firm_1.2.1
entities.evidence: firm_1.2.1,10/22/18,1. Auto-Trigger Mode에서 상태 메시지 delay time 1초에서 0.5초로 변경

entities.name: FPGA
entities.evidence: FPGA 레지스터 이름 및 어드레스 변경 (auto-trigger 기능)

entities.name: Atheros 1000MB PHY chip
entities.evidence: PHY chip Atheros 1000MB kernel config 추가

concepts.name: Auto-Trigger Mode
concepts.evidence: Auto-Trigger Mode에서 상태 메시지 delay time 1초에서 0.5초로 변경

concepts.name: FPGA register configuration
concepts.evidence: FPGA 레지스터 이름 및 어드레스 변경 (auto-trigger 기능)

evidence.claim: The source is a firmware release table with columns for firmware version, date, and contents.
firm_1.1.1 changed register address output values from decimal to hexadecimal notation.
evidence.evidenceText: 레지스터 어드레스 출력 시 값을 10진수를 16진수로 표기 변경

evidence.claim: firm_1.1.1 changed and added FPGA register names and addresses for the auto-trigger function.
evidence.evidenceText: FPGA 레지스터 이름 및 어드레스 변경 (auto-trigger 기능)

evidence.claim: The release history records implementation of logging for image acquisition, FPGA or firmware register read/write, command transmission and reception, first firmware connection, and errors.
evidence.evidenceText: <Log 기능 구현> 1. 영상 획득 관련 로그 2. FPGA 레지스터 또는 펌웨어 자체 설정 레지스터 관련 로그 3. command 송수신 관련 로그 4. Detector 전원이 켜지고 F/W 최초 connection 날짜 및 시간 5. 각종 Error 날짜 및 시간

evidence.claim: The Set FPGA/ROIC timeout condition was changed from 3 seconds to 1 second.
A kernel change was made to address shutdown during boot by enabling USB_OTG_VBUS and disabling USB_H1_VBUS.
evidence.evidenceText: 부팅 도중 down되는 증상 보완 => USB_OTG_VBUS 라인 Enable, USB_H1_VBUS 라인 Disable

evidence.claim: firm_1.1.2 fixed abnormal preview status message behavior during get bright operation in auto trigger mode.
evidence.evidenceText: firm_1.1.2,8/21/18,"1. auto trigger 모드에서 get bright 동작 시, preview status message 비정상 동작 수정"

evidence.claim: firm_1.1.4 increased the firmware-to-PC image buffer size from 128 to 1460 for improved Gigabit Ethernet throughput up to max 390 Mbps.
evidence.evidenceText: Gigabit Ethernet Throughput 성능 향상(max 390Mbps)을 위해 F/W -> PC image buffer size 128 -> 1460 (max) 증가 변경

evidence.claim: firm_1.1.4 added kernel configuration for an Atheros 1000MB PHY chip.
evidence.evidenceText: PHY chip Atheros 1000MB kernel config 추가 CONFIG_NETDEV_1000=y CONFIG_ATL1=y CONFIG_ATL1E=y CONFIG_ATL1C=y

evidence.claim: firm_1.1.6 restored send packet size and data type and prevented sending the auto trigger flag in line trigger mode.
evidence.evidenceText: send packet size 및 자료형 원복 ... Line trigger mode에서 auto trigger flag 전송 하지 않도록 수정

evidence.claim: firm_1.2.0 added and changed FPGA parameters, deleting AED_TEST_MODE3 and AED_CNT and adding NEGA_AED_TH, POSI_AED_TH, and AED_DARK_DELAY.
evidence.evidenceText: FPGA Parameter 추가 및 변경 AED_CMD -> aed_test_mode3 삭제 AED_CNT 삭제 NEGA_AED_TH 추가 POSI_AED_TH 추가 AED_DARK_DELAY 추가

evidence.claim: firm_1.2.1 changed Auto-Trigger Mode status message delay time from 1 second to 0.5 seconds.
evidence.evidenceText: firm_1.2.1,10/22/18,1. Auto-Trigger Mode에서 상태 메시지 delay time 1초에서 0.5초로 변경

reviewFlags.reason: No explicit document date is provided; dates appear as firmware release row dates only.
Authority signal is 'general' and no regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified in the source text.
Product model is taken from source metadata productSignal, not from the release table text.
No standards are referenced in the source text.
